# AGB-CRM — LLM / agent documentation index

> Curated entry points for coding agents (Claude, Codex, Cursor, Grok).
> Structure is derived into THE BRAIN graph via `pnpm brain:build` (docs corpus).
> Prefer Brain rebuild-guard search on `/brain` or `searchBrain()` for “does it exist?”.

## Portfolio map (THE BRAIN)

- [Brain ops runbook](brain-ops.md) — regenerate graph, CI, freshness, secrets
- [THE BRAIN HLR](requirements/THE-BRAIN-HLR.md) — product requirements for the living map
- [Brain Phase 1 build plan](requirements/brain-phase1/00-BUILD-PLAN.md)
- [Brain CRM-native UI notes](brain-crm-native-ui-2026-07-17.md)

## Getting oriented

- [Getting started](GETTING-STARTED.md)
- [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) — agent operating rules for this repo (root)

- [VAV ↔ CaneyCloud ↔ CRM sync status](VAV-CaneyCloud-CRM-sync-status.md)

- CRM **Platforms** hub (`/platforms`) — live health + partner-room linkage chips

## RCA / agent tools

Skills: [investigate](skills/investigate.md) · [remediate](skills/remediate.md)

| Tool | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `brain_search` | Locate systems, surfaces, wires, **docs/adr** |
| `brain_neighborhood` | Blast radius + linked docs |
| `brain_doc_get` | Read `docs/**` body safely |
| `brain_freshness` | Graph age + SHAs |
| `brain_rca_pack` | One-shot investigation pack |
| `brain_remediation_gate` | Soft pre-PR citation/tests checklist |
| `brain_correlate_error` | Offline route/error → node map |

Failure-mode seeds: [docs/RCA/failure-modes/](RCA/failure-modes/)

When diagnosing:

1. `brain_search` / `brain_rca_pack`
2. `brain_neighborhood` on architecture ids
3. `brain_doc_get` for runbooks/ADRs/FMs
4. Cite node ids + doc paths; never invent surfaces on empty search

## Corpus model (Phase 1)


Markdown under `docs/**` is scanned on `pnpm brain:build`. Optional YAML frontmatter:

```yaml
---
brain_node: crm.capture   # join key to architecture node id
type: howto               # howto | explanation | reference | adr | failure-mode
system: crm
title: Human title
summary: One-line agent-facing summary
---
```

Doc nodes use kind `doc` or `adr` and edge kind `documents` when `brain_node` resolves.
